parsed.production_notes: The presenter's face exhibits uncanny smoothness and unnatural lip-syncing that doesn't perfectly match the audio. The background is completely static, and the voiceover has the typical cadence and tone of an AI text-to-speech model.

characters.appearance: Young Asian male, slim build, fair complexion. He has short, straight black hair parted slightly off-center. His facial features are smooth with dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: A plain, light grey short-sleeved t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially expresses frustration, transitioning to a confident and informative tone.

scenes.setting: Modern open-plan office, daytime, neutral color palette with greys and whites.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Asian man sits in a black office chair in a modern, open-plan office. He is holding a smartphone in his hands, resting them on his lap. The office behind him features glass partitions, white desks, computer monitors, and fluorescent ceiling lights. The background is slightly out of focus, drawing attention to the subject. The man looks directly at the camera, speaking with a serious expression. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a corporate office environment. His posture is relaxed but engaged.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows Character A sitting in an office, talking directly to the camera. A white text box with black and yellow text appears at the top. Subtitles with a green background highlight key phrases from his speech at the bottom. The overall tone is relatable and slightly frustrated as he discusses his struggles with English at work. The camera remains static throughout the shot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Honestly, poor English at work almost ruined my confidence.
Character A says: Every meeting I knew what to say, but the words just wouldn't come out until I found something that actually worked.
scenes.on_screen_text:
What 30 Days of Microspeaking Did for My Career
Honestly
poor English at work
almost ruined my confidence
Every meeting
I knew what to say
but the words just wouldn't come out
until I found something that actually worked

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene consists of a heavily blurred background. The blurred shapes and colors suggest the same modern office environment from the previous scene. Muted greys, whites, and hints of light from windows or fixtures are visible through the blur. No distinct objects or characters can be identified due to the strong depth-of-field effect. The overall color palette remains neutral and corporate. The lighting appears consistent with the previous office setting, though diffused by the blur.

scenes.visual_description: This scene is a full-screen screencast of an app interface overlaid on a blurred background. The UI displays a list titled 'SPEAK 20 TOPICS IN 20 DAYS' with checkboxes and daily topics. As the voiceover progresses, the checkboxes are sequentially ticked green, indicating progress. Subtitles with a green background appear at the bottom of the screen, matching the voiceover. The visual focuses entirely on the app's structured learning path.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Now, instead of scrolling on my phone, I spend just 10 minutes a day on Fluently.
Character A says: An app that helps you master one real topic at a time, like meetings, small talk, or presentations.
Character A says: You don't memorize. You practice speaking until it feels natural.
Character A says: And honestly, it's a total game changer.
Character A says: I sound fluent, confident, and people actually listen.
scenes.on_screen_text:
SPEAK 20 TOPICS IN 20 DAYS
(10-15 minutes a day to sound natural and confident)
DAY 1: Introduce Yourself & Talk About Your Hometown
DAY 2: Daily Routine & Morning Habits
DAY 3: Work, Career Goals & Job Interviews
DAY 4: Technology in Everyday Life
DAY 5: Fitness, Health & Well-being
DAY 6: Food, Cooking & Eating Habits
DAY 7: Travel, Vacations & Dream Destinations
DAY 8: Home, Living Space & Comfort
DAY 9: Environment & Modern Lifestyle
DAY 10: Culture, Art & Hobbies
DAY 11: Music, Movies & Books You Love
DAY 12: Sports & Free Time
DAY 13: Shopping & Money Habits
DAY 14: Media, News & Social Trends
DAY 15: Science & The Future
DAY 16: Festivals, Holidays & Celebrations
DAY 17: Business, Startups & The Future of Work
DAY 18: Public Services & Volunteering
DAY 19: Your Life Goals & Future Plans
DAY 20: Review & Reflection
Now, instead of scrolling on my phone
I spend just 10 minutes a day on Fluently
an app that helps you master one real topic at a time
like meetings, small talk, or presentations
You don't memorize
You practice speaking until it feels natural
And honestly, it's a total game changer
I sound fluent, confident, and people actually listen

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene features a smooth, dark gradient background. The colors transition from a deep, dark purple at the top to an almost black shade at the bottom. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a sleek and modern atmosphere. The space is entirely empty, serving as a blank canvas. There are no characters, physical props, or distinct architectural elements present. The overall aesthetic is minimalistic and digital.

scenes.visual_description: The final scene is an end card with a dark purple gradient background. In the center, there is a large, rounded square app icon featuring two white forward arrows on a blue background. Below the icon, the text 'Fluently App' and 'AI-power English coach' is displayed in white. A prominent purple 'DOWNLOAD NOW' button is positioned at the bottom. The layout is clean and directs the viewer to take action.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Fluently App
AI-power English coach
DOWNLOAD NOW
